title: 你喜欢看短视频吗？
pinyin: Nǐ xǐhuan kàn duǎn shìpín ma?
titleTranslation_en: Do You Like Watching Short Videos?
description_uz: «Qaysi ilovada ko'rasan?» — Ikki do'st qisqa videolar haqida suhbatlashadi: qaysi ilova, qanday kontent, har kuni qancha vaqt, foydasi va o'zi video olish. Bu dialog odatlar haqida so'rash, fikr bildirish va tavsiya berishni mashq qiladi. Kundalik texnologiya mavzusidagi amaliy so'zlarga boy. Tinglash va rol o'ynash uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «В каком приложении ты смотришь?» — Двое друзей говорят о коротких видео: какое приложение, какой контент, сколько времени в день, польза и съёмка своих видео. Диалог тренирует расспросы о привычках, выражение мнения и советы. Богат практичной лексикой о повседневных технологиях. Отлично подходит для аудирования и ролевой игры.
description_en: «Which app do you watch them on?» — Two friends talk about short videos: which app, what content, how long a day, whether they're useful, and shooting your own. The dialogue practices asking about habits, giving opinions, and making suggestions. Rich in practical everyday-tech vocabulary. Great for listening and role-play.

sentences.text_original: 你平时喜欢看短视频吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ píngshí xǐhuan kàn duǎn shìpín ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты обычно любишь смотреть короткие видео?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you usually like watching short videos?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 喜欢，我每天都会刷一会儿。
sentences.pinyin: Xǐhuan, wǒ měitiān dōu huì shuā yíhuìr.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, har kuni bir oz ko'rib turaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Люблю, я каждый день немного листаю.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah, I scroll through them for a bit every day.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: Which app do you watch them on?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_translation_en: Douyin — there's a lot of content on it.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: What kind of content do you watch?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我喜欢看做饭和旅游的视频。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuan kàn zuòfàn hé lǚyóu de shìpín.
sentences.text_translation: Men ovqat pishirish va sayohat videolarini ko'rishni yoqtiraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я люблю смотреть видео про готовку и путешествия.
sentences.text_translation_en: I like watching cooking and travel videos.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_ru: Сколько времени ты смотришь каждый день?
sentences.text_translation_en: How long do you watch each day?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 大概半小时，有时候看太久就停不下来。
sentences.pinyin: Dàgài bàn xiǎoshí, yǒu shíhou kàn tài jiǔ jiù tíng bù xiàlái.
sentences.text_translation: Taxminan yarim soat, ba'zan uzoq ko'rib qolib, to'xtata olmayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Примерно полчаса, иногда засмотрюсь и не могу остановиться.
sentences.text_translation_en: About half an hour — sometimes I watch too long and can't stop.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ juéde duǎn shìpín yǒuyòng ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Как ты думаешь, короткие видео полезны?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you think short videos are useful?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 有的有用，可以学东西，有的只是好玩。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒude yǒuyòng, kěyǐ xué dōngxi, yǒude zhǐshì hǎowán.
sentences.text_translation: Ba'zilari foydali, biror narsa o'rgansa bo'ladi, ba'zilari shunchaki qiziqarli.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Некоторые полезны, можно что-то выучить, некоторые просто для развлечения.
sentences.text_translation_en: Some are useful — you can learn things; some are just for fun.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zìjǐ pāi guo duǎn shìpín ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Have you ever shot a short video yourself?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 拍过几次，但是拍得不好。
sentences.pinyin: Pāi guo jǐ cì, dànshì pāi de bù hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Bir necha marta olganman, lekin yaxshi chiqmadi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Снимал несколько раз, но получилось не очень.
sentences.text_translation_en: A few times, but they didn't come out well.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yě xiǎng shìshi, nán bù nán?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я тоже хочу попробовать, это сложно?
sentences.text_translation_en: I want to try too — is it hard?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不难，用手机就能拍，我教你。
sentences.pinyin: Bù nán, yòng shǒujī jiù néng pāi, wǒ jiāo nǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Qiyin emas, telefon bilan olsa bo'ladi, men o'rgataman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Несложно, можно снять на телефон, я тебя научу.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not hard — you can shoot it with your phone; I'll teach you.
sentences.speaker: B
